The residence

Amélie

A first-floor one-bedroom residence in the stone village heart of Green Coast, Palasë — over 98 square metres gross, generously scaled for its type. Set moments above the central plaza, it pairs a calm, well-proportioned interior with the resort's promenades, pools and the Blue Flag beach below.

Location within the resort

Amélie · Zona G8, Green Coast Resort

Explore the residence

Walk it, room by room

Tap any room on the plan to see its size.

Position within Green Coast

Where Amélie sits

Amélie sits at the centre-west of the village, directly above in the quarter. The central plaza is a short, level walk east, the hotel and its services just beyond, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.

Location & setting

Life at Green Coast

Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.

Centre-west of the village, above the parking entrance
98.23 m² gross · generously scaled for a one-bedroom
